ibrary/OracleLibrary.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6a571e7f5d20f20747029a37d1d924a98d38bcbe10617304c09053200bd73de8","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://0f3b1e6604da8277519dd3464809a05f1498938462448850bb8bfcff0ad37e01","dweb:/ipfs/QmX1LXdo1yqVdKJLjJ4QQ8cr4Qm5sWwfucQHWHzBCRH2Hf"]}},"version":1}

calculateStakingRewards((uint256,uint256.details: Calculates how many TORUS rewards a user’s shares are entitled to.      The formula is:          userRewards = (rewardPool * userShares) / totalShares[dayIndex]

params.stakeIndexes: The list of stake positions to claim.

params.torusAmount: The amount of TORUS to stake.

claim(uint256).notice: Claim your stake in full after its end time, receiving principal + all earned rewards.

claimBatch(uint256[]).notice: Claim multiple matured stakes in one transaction.

createTorus(uint256,uint24).notice: Create a new torus create period that lasts "lengthInDays", using "power" from 1..10000.

earlyEndStake(uint256).notice: Allows ending the stake early (after at least 50% of duration),         returning principal + partial rewards.

expWad(int256).notice: Calculates the exponential function in wad (1e18 fixed point).

getCurrentDayIndex().notice: Returns the day index (starting at 1) since protocol start.

getDifficultyFactor().notice: Returns the difficulty factor, which grows exponentially with time (in years) since protocol start.

getEthAmountForTitanX(uint256).notice: Returns the ETH amount required to get a given amount of TitanX tokens.

stakeTorus(uint256,uint24).notice: Stake an amount of already owned TORUS for a chosen duration, paying         a fee = 5% of “the cost to create that many tokens for the same duration”.
